creator: kaoru@kaisei.org
text:
At Thu, 7 Jan 2010 09:00:46 +0800,
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> This news is great, could you provide a new shar file for this port?
> Thanks very much!

New shar file for japanese/asterisk16-sounds:

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	asterisk16-sounds
#	asterisk16-sounds/pkg-descr
#	asterisk16-sounds/Makefile
#	asterisk16-sounds/pkg-message
#	asterisk16-sounds/distinfo
#	asterisk16-sounds/pkg-plist
#
echo c - asterisk16-sounds
mkdir -p asterisk16-sounds > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - asterisk16-sounds/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >asterisk16-sounds/pkg-descr << '0db17b7551313caab50724b67e327e93'
XThis is a Japanese sound files for Asterisk 1.6.
XWhen you use Asterisk, you can use it in a limit, royalty-free.
XPlease refer to Japanese ReadMe.txt.
X
XWWW: http://voip-info.jp/
0db17b7551313caab50724b67e327e93
echo x - asterisk16-sounds/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >asterisk16-sounds/Makefile << '56af79e63c508103969e37f1bc0a49c8'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	ja-asterisk16-sounds
X# Date created:		2009-10-09
X# Whom:			TAKAHASHI Kaoru <kaoru@kaisei.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	asterisk16-sounds
XPORTVERSION=	1.6
XCATEGORIES=	japanese net
XMASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/sounds/${PORTVERSION:S|.|_|}/ \
X	ftp://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/sounds/${PORTVERSION:S|.|_|}/
XDISTNAME=	asterisk-sound-jp_${PORTVERSION:S|.||}_pre
X
XMAINTAINER=	kaoru@kaisei.org
XCOMMENT=	Japanese sound files for Asterisk 1.6
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	asterisk:${PORTSDIR}/net/asterisk16
X
XNO_BUILD=	yes
XASTERISKSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/asterisk/sounds
X
Xdo-install:
X	@-${MKDIR} ${ASTERISKSDIR}
X	@${MKDIR} ${ASTERISKSDIR}/ja
X	for gsm in ${WRKDIR}/ja/*.gsm; do \
X		${INSTALL_DATA} "$$gsm" ${ASTERISKSDIR}/ja ; \
X	done
X	@${MKDIR} ${ASTERISKSDIR}/ja/digits
X	for digitgsm in ${WRKDIR}/ja/digits/*.gsm; do \
X		${INSTALL_DATA} "$$digitgsm" ${ASTERISKSDIR}/ja/digits ; \
X	done
X	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/ja/README.txt ${DOCSDIR}
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
56af79e63c508103969e37f1bc0a49c8
echo x - asterisk16-sounds/pkg-message
sed 's/^X//' >asterisk16-sounds/pkg-message << '91a334a87e6ee1c5408dc39578f32fbc'
X=============================================================================
X[FYI]
X There is 2 patch files for Japanese grammar of Asterisk to a ftp server.
X
X - set patch files into  ports/net/asterisk16/files 
X	patch-apps::app_voicemail.c
X	patch-main::say.c
X   see ftp://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/patch/
X       http://ftp.voip-info.jp/asterisk/patch/
X 
X - recompile net/astersi16 ports
X
X=============================================================================
91a334a87e6ee1c5408dc39578f32fbc
echo x - asterisk16-sounds/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >asterisk16-sounds/distinfo << '4f95f5b0b50625c6c40a1b14ee899a6e'
XMD5 (asterisk-sound-jp_16_pre.tar.gz) = 1c2d879965358241f53a1e5101371e74
XSHA256 (asterisk-sound-jp_16_pre.tar.gz) = 576d2f47beded83449b69dbb32c4c0467451547bf4d126346000bc3bf5eb4071
XSIZE (asterisk-sound-jp_16_pre.tar.gz) = 945968
4f95f5b0b50625c6c40a1b14ee899a6e
echo x - asterisk16-sounds/pkg-plist
